# Contributing to 10xPilot_snRNAseq-human

Thank you for your interest in improving `10xPilot_snRNAseq-human`.

## Before opening a pull request

Please open an issue first for substantial changes so the team can
confirm scope, approach, and fit with the project.

## Small changes

Documentation fixes, typo corrections, and broken-link fixes are welcome
through direct pull requests.

## Larger changes

For code, analysis, or data-organization changes:

- describe the motivation in a GitHub issue first
- keep changes focused and easy to review
- avoid including sensitive, private, or restricted data

## Questions and support

Use [GitHub issues](https://github.com/LieberInstitute/10xPilot_snRNAseq-human/issues)
for public questions, bug reports, and feature requests whenever
possible.
